summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with hands-on experience building ETL pipelines, cleaning and transforming large-scale datasets, and designing relational database schemas for production systems. Built a data augmentation pipeline scaling training datasets from hundreds to 10,000+ samples with automated validation and edge case handling, designed normalized SQL schemas to store and query model outputs and metadata, and maintained automated test suites with 35+ tests ensuring data accuracy across every deployment. Proficient in Python with Pandas and NumPy for data transformation, and experienced working with REST APIs and JSON data formats.

skills.languages: Python, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, NLP, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Vector Embeddings, SHAP
skills.infra: ETL Pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), FastAPI, RESTful APIs, JSON, PostgreSQL, Supabase, AWS, GCP, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
